children.heading: Conservation Area
children.label: 1 Conservation Area
children.text: The term “Conservation Area” means the Dominguez-Escalante National Conservation Area established by .section 460zzz–1(a)(1) of this title

children.heading: Council
children.label: 2 Council
children.text: The term “Council” means the Dominguez-Escalante National Conservation Area Advisory Council established under .section 460zzz–6 of this title

children.heading: Management plan
children.label: 3 Management plan
children.text: The term “management plan” means the management plan developed under .section 460zzz–5 of this title

children.heading: Map
children.label: 4 Map
children.text: The term “Map” means the map entitled “Dominguez-Escalante National Conservation Area” and dated .September 15, 2008

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.heading: State
children.label: 6 State
children.text: The term “State” means the State of Colorado.

children.heading: Wilderness
children.label: 7 Wilderness
children.text: The term “Wilderness” means the Dominguez Canyon Wilderness Area designated by .section 460zzz–2(a) of this title
